messages.content: You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Charged for annual plan but signed up for monthly

I signed up for the monthly Pro plan last week, but my credit card statement shows a charge of $299 which looks like the annual plan price. I never selected an annual subscription and only wanted to pay month-to-month while I evaluate the software. Can you please confirm what plan I was actually enrolled in and issue a refund for the difference if I was incorrectly billed? I'd like to stay on a monthly plan going forward.
billing
You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Invoice PDF export crashing entire billing module

Ever since your update pushed through last night, clicking 'Export to PDF' on any invoice causes the entire billing module to freeze and then crash with an error that just says 'Unexpected server response (503)' — completely useless. I've tried it on three different invoices and two different browsers, same result every time. This is a massive problem because I have 12 invoices I need to send to clients TODAY and I literally cannot do my job right now. Please tell me there's a hotfix coming because this is completely unacceptable for a paid subscription service.
bug
You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Charged for annual plan but I selected monthly

When I signed up last week, I specifically chose the monthly billing option at $29/month, but my credit card was charged $299 for what appears to be an annual subscription. I never agreed to an annual commitment and I have a screenshot of the checkout page confirming I selected 'Monthly' before clicking the purchase button. I'd like to either be refunded the difference and switched to monthly billing, or receive a full refund so I can re-subscribe with the correct plan. Please advise on how to proceed as soon as possible.
billing

Subject: Invoice PDF export completely broken after today's update

Ever since your forced update pushed through this morning, every single time I try to export an invoice to PDF in BillingPro it just hangs on 'Generating document...' and never finishes — I've left it running for 20 minutes and nothing happens. I have THREE invoices due to clients TODAY and I literally cannot get them out the door, which is making me look completely unprofessional. I've tried restarting the app, clearing the cache, and even reinstalling from scratch and none of it made any difference. Please tell me someone is actually working on this because I'm losing money sitting here waiting.
bug

Subject: Add bulk user deactivation option in admin dashboard

We recently went through a company-wide restructuring and had to manually deactivate over 200 employee accounts one by one, which took our IT admin several hours. It would be incredibly helpful if the admin dashboard included a way to select multiple users and deactivate or offboard them all at once, similar to how bulk deletion already works. Ideally we could also filter by department or last login date before applying the bulk action. This would be a huge time-saver during audits and org changes.
feature
You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Partnership Opportunity – Accessibility Tools Integration

Hi there, I'm the founder of a small nonprofit called OpenAccess that develops screen reader plugins and keyboard navigation tools for people with visual and motor impairments. We've been using your platform internally and think there's a genuinely exciting opportunity to integrate our tools directly into your product to better serve users with disabilities. I'd love to connect with whoever handles partnership or business development discussions to explore what this could look like. Please feel free to reach out at partnerships@openaccessorg.org or I'm happy to schedule a call at your convenience.
other

Subject: Allow bulk reassignment of tasks when removing a team member

When we offboard an employee and remove them from our workspace, we currently have to go through every single open task one by one to reassign it to someone else — which is incredibly tedious for larger teams. It would be a huge time-saver if, upon deactivating or removing a user, the system prompted us to bulk reassign all of their open tasks to another team member in a single step. Even a simple dropdown asking 'Reassign all open tasks to:' before confirming the removal would make this process so much smoother. This comes up for us almost every time someone leaves the company and it's easily the most painful part of our offboarding workflow.
feature
